title: Strange Items
description: Track stats on individual tools so you can see which of your Diamond Pickaxes you actually use
body:
This mod (inspired by Team Fortress 2) allows individual tools to track stats on them, seprarately from the statistics screen.

Now you can know which of your Diamond Pickaxes you've used more!

Some trackers, specifically `Blocks Mined`, `Mobs Killed`, and `Time Spent in Dimensions` can track what specific blocks you've mined and amounts, what amount of a specific mob you've killed, and how much time you've spent in each dimension.

You can configure which item has what trackers with datapacks using certain item tags (though some items won't be able to track certain statistics).

By default, every trackable item is:
- Every Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe, and Spear
- Mace
- Bow
- Flint And Steel
- Shears
- Elytra
- Trident
- Brush
- Fishing Rod
- Every Helmet
- Every Chestplate
- Every Legging
- Every Boots
- Crossbow

If you don't like the order the trackers appear in on the item tooltip, you can change it by overriding the tag in `data/strangeitems/tags/strangeitems/tracker/tooltip_order.json`, just like enchantments.

![Diamond Pickaxe tooltip with statistics shown on it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PQfbRPXR/images/c3ef8e54456d9c8c0360de1d9f83d1739d2f27fe.png)

# Collector's Items

You can also mark specific items as a "Collector's Item" (also inspired by Team Fortress 2) by combining the item you want to be a Collector's variant of with an Echo Shard and duplicate of the item your converting in a smithing table

While with commands you can make any item a Collector's Item, by default in Survival Mode the items you can make a Collector's Variant is controlled by [this item tag](https://github.com/embinmc/strange_items/blob/main/src/main/resources/data/strangeitems/tags/item/can_make_collectors_item.json), at `data/strangeitems/tags/item/can_make_collectors_item.json`, if you're on 26.1 or above.

![A Collector's Netherite Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PQfbRPXR/images/4623d133b8febed6f8984fe6de7ccaf336997dc4.png)
